label: Document intelligence & information extraction

node.label: Document intelligence & information extraction
node.definition: Document-intelligence systems extract entities, relations, tables, layouts, classifications, and structured records from text-heavy or scanned documents.
node.why_it_matters: They bridge unstructured organizational evidence and transactional software while preserving traceable source context.
limitations: Layout variation, OCR error, schema drift, long documents, and ambiguous entities require validation and provenance.

dependencies.rationale: Document intelligence & information extraction integrates Encoder-only bidirectional transformers as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
Document intelligence & information extraction integrates Hidden Markov models & CRFs as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
Document intelligence & information extraction integrates Multimodal foundation models as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
Document intelligence & information extraction integrates Structured outputs & typed action generation as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
Document intelligence & information extraction integrates Provenance, citations & evidence tracking as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
